definition.name: circuit_fidelity
definition.definition: The circuit fidelity parameter f_2 = -(2/N)log_d(F̃), where F̃ = F - d^{-N} and F = E_U[Tr[Λ_U(|0⟩⟨0|) U|0⟩⟨0|U†]] is the average state fidelity. f_2 measures the number of errors per qudit in the circuit. [Ref: Eq.(17) of Sauliere2026, line 254]
